name: The White House
subject: Keeping America Safe
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a64f366a91e8d393508553b025d94b8bd3f8d238c4d0708ce19892b53c2a2002f05b233ad36e79d7481edc07c141e9f3c1dee2cf05bdb364

On Sunday, President Donald J. Trump announced the establishment of enhanced national security measures, aimed at creating—for the first time in history—minimum requirements for international cooperation to support visa and immigration vetting and adjudications for individuals seeking entry to the United States. This is a critical step toward establishing an immigration system that protects Americans’ safety and security in an era of dangerous terrorism and transnational crime.

“Our government's first duty is to its people, to our citizens -- to serve their needs, to ensure their safety, to preserve their rights, and to defend their values.”

-------------

Strengthening Security Standards for Traveling to America

President Trump is taking key steps to protect the American people from those who would enter our country and do us harm. The President is putting the security of the Nation first by implementing minimum security standards for immigration, enhancing security through more rigorous vetting, and properly screening individuals coming to this country in order to ensure the safety of the American people.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a64f366a91e8d3934c53d89d1f114003515a07c012daf9e03cb77905d42bc764fd177cc8aa1fbe54a69d8a479e89808858cb3f96873be957
Read more

First Lady Melania Trump's First White House Kitchen Garden Event

First Lady Melania Trump welcomed several children from the Girls and Boys Club of Greater Washington, FBR Clubhouse in Ward 8, to the White House on Friday. Along with the National Park Service (NPS), which maintains the White House grounds, the group spent time in the White House Kitchen Garden learning about the importance of the outdoors and healthy eating.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a64f366a91e8d3931b3b01ecedfb4ac0d8377b5ce244b4c0364672925719e9496534f2d8e983a7c57d763259e3f3799da7abbc1728fd5996
Watch the video

Hurricane Maria

The federal government is continuing to provide life-saving and life-sustaining resources to Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands. While significant progress in being made in the response to Hurricane Maria, recovery for Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands will be long and will require the help of the whole community. As access to ports, airfields, and roads continue to open, resources will become more easily available to the hardest hit areas.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a64f366a91e8d393874ed97a55e7cb7de3c24e39ad25af2ac5d689feaef1fe228c53be44008a2b01531112957100555d512f90e9207bc663
Get more information

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump and Prince Harry at the Invictus Games | September 23, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence. The President will then make an announcement on his Administration’s commitment to equipping the American workforce for jobs of the future.

Vice President Mike Pence will travel to visit NASA’s Marshall Space Flight Center in Huntsville, Alabama. There, the Vice President will visit with NASA officials and employees, and tour the center including the science mission bridge to the International Space Station.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a64f366a91e8d3939429b31933d4eb0c74a86fb23c3920628a816a9fff045354e0b702c6d2baf294ef770718e35c09ec5648f39d0bb13ee1
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a64f366a91e8d393d6383695371ea848c4ed6b2f01130c8b305265824963b6d1fb4fd4401e835150467ea34bc33a0cd92d5ec92985ba7c26
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4006ab318b566352a1fccb09e126950b0efeee3971189ec9000f7e6cf61476af4938136aece5742a1b73a24c15f6120fe
Unsubscribe

There are only 43 days standing between us and Election Day 2017.

And in order for Democrats to win, I want to make sure our volunteers in states like Virginia have all the resources they need so that they can continue to knock on doors and reach voters from now until polls close.

Saturday's fundraising deadline will decide how much support we can send their way.

subject: End the war on marijuana
body:
Add your name to take action for marijuana justice.

(http://www.drugpolicy.org?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

(https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

Urge your senators to end marijuana prohibition

Add Your Name (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

Dear %%FIRST NAME%%,

The future of marijuana legalization has arrived. In a groundbreaking move, U.S. Senator Cory Booker recently introduced the Marijuana Justice Act, which aims to end federal marijuana prohibition and repair the harms the war on drugs has caused low income and communities of color.

Today, on behalf of the Drug Policy Alliance, I'm turning to advocates like you to help us end federal marijuana prohibition once and for all. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

More than 60 million people live in states where marijuana prohibition is a thing of the past, and countless others benefit from access to medical marijuana. But marijuana is still illegal at the federal level.

As someone who cares about this issue, please urge your senators to support and cosponsor the historic Marijuana Justice Act. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

(https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

Take action now – let your senators know you care about the Marijuana Justice Act.

Add Your Name (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

Advocates like you are the reason marijuana legalization is a reality in eight states. The question is no longer "should we legalize marijuana?" but "how do we legalize marijuana?"

You play a big role in answering that question. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

Not only will the Marijuana Justice Act end the federal prohibition of marijuana, it will also cut law enforcement funding for states with racially disparate marijuana arrests and pave the way for community reinvestment in areas most impacted by the drug war.

It's time to stand up and right the wrongs of prohibition. Please tell your senators to support the Marijuana Justice Act today. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)
Sincerely,

Queen Adesuyi
Policy Associate, National Affairs
Drug Policy Alliance P.S. Marijuana is legal in eight states, and medical marijuana is legal in twenty-nine states. It's time to end the federal prohibition of marijuana once and for all. The Marijuana Justice Act will tackle this crucial issue. Please urge your senators to support it. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/dems-take-action-marijuana-justice?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

(https://www.facebook.com/drugpolicy/) (https://twitter.com/drugpolicyorg) (https://www.instagram.com/drugpolicyalliance/)

(http://www.drugpolicy.org?ms=2A1_1709DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy18democrats&utm_source=1709demsonacq1&utm_medium=email&cid=70141000000f1zZAAQ)

If they succeed, millions will lose their coverage, and critical protections for patients with pre-existing conditions will be eliminated. The bill is incredibly destructive. Unless we do something fast, Republicans might actually succeed. Let's keep organizing and resisting. Help grow this grassroots network before it's too late by rushing in a contribution. We can't allow Republicans to destabilize our health care system and give insurers free reign to do as they please. name: Team Kaine
subject: 27 more people needed from your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hey -- this is Jenny, Tim Kaine's finance director. I wanted to write you a quick note today because **[we've got less than a week until the first major FEC deadline of Tim's reelection campaign, and to be honest, our numbers aren't as strong as we need them to be.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JFFMoHkwMrt9XSVQ3Ih6Pkt61tKNjFUe)**

This isn't just our first big deadline of the race -- it's also our first big deadline since Corey Stewart, an extremist "mini-Trump," announced that he's going to run "the most vicious, ruthless" campaign possible against Tim. Right now, we have the opportunity to really make a statement. If we can hit our goal of raising $70,000 by the September 30th deadline, we can show Corey Stewart (and the right-wing special interests who want to see him rubber stamping Trump's agenda) that Tim is in this fight to win.

**I can't tell you how much I appreciate you being on Team Kaine. But we still need 27 more people from 20112 to chip in if we want to reach our goal. Can you be one of them and pitch in today? Every dollar counts:**

**[https://www.timkaine.com/september-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ygj6OXweD7lHqGRjm8vsd0t61tKNjFUe)**

The only way we're going to keep Tim in the Senate is by continuing to build major grassroots support from people like you. Thank you so much for having Tim's back.

-Jenny

Jenny Nadicksbernd, Team Kaine Finance Director
---
| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pgJOA%2BbBrJECcHhlhe4ag0t61tKNjFUe).
---

body:
Republicans in the U.S. Senate continue to play dangerous partisan games with health care. If you can believe it, the latest proposal to repeal the Affordable Care Act may be even worse than previous proposals.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120333e/2fde7c66/45cd5d90/156940ec/1545353979/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-congress-dont-vote-to-destroy-our-healthcare?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC")
---
It's happening again, Friend.

Republicans in the U.S. Senate continue to play dangerous partisan games with health care. If you can believe it, the latest proposal to repeal the Affordable Care Act may be even worse than previous proposals.

Independent analysts tell us this bill would raise premiums, weaken protections for people with pre-existing conditions, and slash over $1 billion from North Carolina's Medicaid program.

**Republicans in the Senate could vote on this bill THIS week. I came out against this bill because North Carolina's middle-class families will be worse off if this passes.**

**[Add your name here if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120333e/2fde7c66/45cd5d90/156940ef/1545353979/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-congress-dont-vote-to-destroy-our-healthcare?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+if+youre+with+me&utm_campaign=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC")**

North Carolinians want our elected officials to work together to find common ground solutions to the problems we face. That includes our senators and representatives in Washington D.C.

Senate Republicans in Washington must work with Democrats to reach a bipartisan solution that expands health care coverage and makes it better.

**[A bill that slashes protections for people with pre-existing conditions is just wrong. Add your name if you agree.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120333e/2fde7c66/45cd5d90/156940ee/1545353979/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-congress-dont-vote-to-destroy-our-healthcare?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+A+bill+that+slashes+protections+for+peop&utm_campaign=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC")**

Thanks for your support on this,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120333e/2fde7c66/45cd5d90/156940e1/1545353979/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/tell-congress-dont-vote-to-destroy-our-healthcare?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC&source=em17_170925_healthcare_adv_gq_ful__RC")

name: New Hampshire Republican Party
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on the CNN healthcare town hall and Senator Shaheen's support of single payer
body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on the CNN healthcare town hall and Senator Shaheen's support of single payer **

**For Immediate Release: **September 25, 2017**Contact: **Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
Concord - NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding the tonight's CNN healthcare town hall and Senator Shaheen's support for single payer:
"While watching Senators Bernie Sanders and Lindsey Graham debate health care tonight on CNN, hard working Granite Staters should remember that Senator Jeanne Shaheen has already chosen a side. She favors a single payer, socialist takeover of our already-failing health care system. Fifty-five percent of Americans oppose the Sanders/Shaheen socialist health care plan. It eliminates employer plans and substitutes them with a one-size-fits-all government solution. At a time in which expanding bureaucracy is causing more problems, not less, in health care markets, Senator Shaheen needs to explain why she wants total government control of our healthcare.”

###
